name: open-design-mcp
description: OpenCode skill teaching AI agents how to use the 10 MCP tools exposed by open-design-mcp (list/get/create/update/delete projects, save artifacts globally or inside projects, lint, compose multi-page briefs, BYOK streaming design generation). Covers env setup, auth modes, multi-daemon registration, the PRD-to-HTML workflow, anti-patterns, and error diagnosis.
compatibility: OpenCode (or any MCP client) with open-design-mcp installed and an Open Design daemon reachable at OD_DAEMON_URL
author: kokorolx <kokoro.lehoang@gmail.com>
